name: admin-console-e2e-relay
description: Real cross-process E2E suite for the F-004 outbox relay delivery service. Launches the actual relay entrypoint (bff/src/relay/index.ts) as a child process against a real temp SQLite outbox DB and real localhost HTTP stub peers -- no mocking of the transport, the DB, or the process boundary. Covers what no unit/spec-level test can: the entrypoint wiring, the drain loop across a real HTTP hop, GET /ready under real conditions, and crash/restart recovery.
